task: Evolve TradingEnv + PPO into full Decision PPO high-level autonomous trade brain
summary: Decision PPO now outputs complete structured trade specifications (lot/risk/vol targeting, multi-unit TP/SL, trailing on/off+dist, partial close levels, breakeven, max hold time, full close conditions). High-level brain decoupled from execution. Works on existing MTF (1m+5m+15m+1h) + best per-symbol features. Full backward compat.
key_deliverables: drl/trading_env.py: DecisionSpec dataclass + extended decode_action (legacy 1/3/6 + rich >=8/18 dim) + ATR precompute + rich simulation (partials, time exits, ATR TP/SL, configurable trail/BE)
drl/decision_head.py: NEW DecisionHead (torch) + DecisionPPOActorCritic for custom policy / distillation
Python/action_translator.py: decision_command JSON builder + rich translate support + MQL5 serializer
tests/test_trading_env.py: rich decode tests + XAU/BTC test data smoke (Decision PPO env mode)
docs/DECISION_PPO.md: full architecture + spec + usage + integration guide

action_space.decode: Always returns flat meta + .decision_spec (DecisionSpec) + .decision_spec_dict for JSON

integration_points.reward: TradingReward now receives real hold_steps + risk_used from DecisionSpec
integration_points.execution: MQL5 ChainGambler (via decision_command JSON) or Python order_manager

compatibility.TUI / PIPELINE_DECISIONS: Unchanged (action_version + decision_ppo flags available for future panels)

next_steps: Wire Decision PPO default in select v6+ training launches (action_config)
Build custom SB3 ActorCriticPolicy using DecisionHead
MQL5 port of DecisionHead (CNet 18-dim head + command parser in EA)
Promotion gates specific to Decision PPO (rich exit quality metrics)
Protobuf version of decision_command for lower-latency handoff
confidence: HIGH (core brain + env sim + spec + translator complete; full SB3 custom policy + MQL5 native are follow-on)
note_for_swarm: Decision PPO is now the authoritative high-level trade specification generator. Lower layers consume the JSON decision_command. Do not regress legacy decode paths.
